title: Transcending the self to transcend suffering.

assets.abstract: Suffering is inevitable in human life. Our perspective paper theorizes on precise mechanisms for how self-transcendence-the state in which an individual looks beyond the self and adopts a larger perspective including concern for others and the world-may help people endure the experience of suffering. From an examination of empirical literature ranging from social psychology to clinical research, we propose that self-transcendence may aid the endurance of suffering along three psychological level

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Bridge paper score=5.0: links Liberation/Enlightenment concept to mechanistic neuroscience
